descriptions.currencies_delete: Permanently delete a currency from the Zoho Expense organization settings. Required: currency_id (path). Destructive and irreversible — the currency must not be in use by any expense, report, or customer record or the API will reject the call. Returns the standard Zoho status payload (code, message). Prefer this only when the currency was created in error; otherwise leave it in place.
descriptions.customers_delete: Permanently delete a customer (contact) record from Zoho Expense. Required: customer_id (path). Destructive — expenses already billed to this customer remain but lose their contact reference. Returns the standard Zoho status payload. Use customers_list to confirm the id first; there is no soft-delete or undo.
descriptions.expense_categories_disable: Hide an expense category so users can no longer pick it on new expenses. Required: category_id (path). Reversible via expense_categories_enable. Existing expenses already tagged to this category are unaffected. Returns the updated category payload. Prefer this over deleting categories you might re-enable later.
descriptions.expense_categories_enable: Re-enable a previously hidden expense category so users can pick it on new expenses. Required: category_id (path). Inverse of expense_categories_disable. Returns the updated category payload. Use expense_categories_list with include_hidden to find disabled categories.
descriptions.expense_reports_approve: Approve a submitted expense report, moving it from 'submitted' to 'approved' status (next stop: reimbursement). Required: report_id (path). Caller must hold approver permission on the report. Returns the updated expense report payload with new status and approver fields. Use expense_reports_reject for the inverse decision.
descriptions.projects_activate: Mark a project as active so it can be assigned to new expenses and trips. Required: project_id (path). Inverse of projects_deactivate. Returns the updated project payload. Common workflow: reactivate seasonal/recurring projects at the start of a new engagement.
descriptions.projects_deactivate: Mark a project as inactive so it can no longer be assigned to new expenses or trips (existing assignments are unaffected). Required: project_id (path). Reversible via projects_activate. Returns the updated project payload. Prefer this over projects_delete when the project may need to be reactivated later.
descriptions.projects_delete: Permanently delete a project from Zoho Expense. Required: project_id (path). Destructive and irreversible — fails if expenses, trips, or invoices reference the project. Returns the standard Zoho status payload. Prefer projects_deactivate for projects with historical assignments; only delete projects created in error.
descriptions.reporting_tags_activate: Activate a reporting tag so it can be assigned to new expenses for cost-center / dimension tracking. Required: tag_id (path). Inverse of reporting_tags_deactivate. Returns the updated tag payload. Reporting tags are the Zoho Expense equivalent of QuickBooks classes.
descriptions.reporting_tags_deactivate: Deactivate a reporting tag so it can no longer be assigned to new expenses (existing assignments are unaffected). Required: tag_id (path). Reversible via reporting_tags_activate. Returns the updated tag payload. Prefer this over reporting_tags_delete for tags with historical data.
descriptions.reporting_tags_delete: Permanently delete a reporting tag. Required: tag_id (path). Destructive — fails if any expense currently references the tag. Returns the standard Zoho status payload. Prefer reporting_tags_deactivate over delete for any tag with historical expense assignments.
descriptions.reporting_tags_list: List all reporting tags in the Zoho Expense organization (active and inactive). No required parameters. Returns an array of ReportingTag objects (tag_id, tag_name, status, options). Use this to discover tag_ids before calling activate/deactivate/delete, or to populate a tag picker.
descriptions.taxes_delete: Permanently delete a tax rate from organization settings. Required: tax_id (path). Destructive — fails if any expense or invoice currently uses the tax. Returns the standard Zoho status payload. Prefer marking the tax inactive in the Zoho UI if you may need it for historical reporting.
descriptions.taxes_list: List all tax rates configured in the Zoho Expense organization. No required parameters. Returns an array of Tax objects (tax_id, tax_name, tax_percentage, tax_type, is_default). Use this to discover the tax_id needed when creating expenses with GST/VAT.
descriptions.trips_approve: Approve a submitted trip request so the traveller can book travel against it. Required: trip_id (path). Caller must hold approver permission on the trip. Returns the updated trip payload with new status and approver fields. Use trips_reject for the inverse decision.
descriptions.trips_cancel: Cancel an approved or in-progress trip. Required: trip_id (path). Cancellation does NOT auto-refund booked expenses — those must be voided separately. Returns the updated trip payload. Use trips_reject when rejecting a submitted-but-not-yet-approved trip; use cancel after approval.
descriptions.trips_delete: Permanently delete a trip request. Required: trip_id (path). Destructive — only allowed on draft or rejected trips; approved trips with bookings must be cancelled instead. Returns the standard Zoho status payload.
descriptions.trips_reject: Reject a submitted trip request so the traveller cannot book against it. Required: trip_id (path). Caller must hold approver permission. Returns the updated trip payload with new status and approver fields. Use trips_cancel for an already-approved trip.
descriptions.users_activate: Mark a user as active so they can log in and submit expenses again. Required: user_id (path). Inverse of users_deactivate. Returns the updated user payload. Common workflow: reactivate a rehired employee or restore an accidentally-deactivated account.
descriptions.users_deactivate: Mark a user as inactive so they can no longer log in or submit expenses (historical expenses and reports remain). Required: user_id (path). Reversible via users_activate. Returns the updated user payload. Prefer this over users_delete when an employee leaves — preserves their expense history for audit.
descriptions.users_delete: Permanently delete a user from the Zoho Expense organization. Required: user_id (path). Destructive — fails if the user has expenses or reports they own; reassignment to another user is required first. Returns the standard Zoho status payload. Prefer users_deactivate to preserve audit trail.
